assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains: name: git-commit-helper, description: "Analyzes staged git changes and generates conventional commit messages with proper type prefixes, monorepo scopes, and breaking change detection."

assertion_results.text: The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
assertion_results.evidence: name: git-commit-helper — contains only lowercase letters and hyphens

assertion_results.text: The description field mentions git commits and when to use the skill
assertion_results.evidence: description: "Analyzes staged git changes and generates conventional commit messages with proper type prefixes, monorepo scopes, and breaking change detection." — mentions generating commit messages but does NOT explicitly mention when to use the skill. The 'When to Use' section is in the body, not the description field.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains workflow or step-by-step instructions
assertion_results.evidence: Body contains a '## Workflow' section with 8 numbered steps: '### 1. Gather Staged Changes', '### 2. Determine the Commit Type', '### 3. Determine the Scope (Monorepo Aware)', '### 4. Detect Breaking Changes', '### 5. Write the Subject Line', '### 6. Write the Body (When Needed)', '### 7. Write Footers (When Needed)', '### 8. Present the Message'

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least one executable script
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/ directory exists containing: parse-diff.sh (1 file)

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids: eval-simple-feature, eval-breaking-change-fix, eval-multi-package-chore)

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 245 lines total, well under the 500-line limit
